Week 7 is live: Week 7 Pre-Draw Edition

Pre-draw edition for 11-17 May 2026 . Week 7 keeps the ATP clay run front and center, with fantasy edges still tied to patience before the bracket is official. The early goal is to map the likely premium anchors, monitor fatigue after consecutive clay weeks, and isolate ranking-based pricing gaps that could matter once the official draw lands and the slate sharpens.

Bonus Ball board: Jannik Sinner, Carlos Alcaraz, Alexander Zverev.
Read the full cheat sheet: https://tennis-automated-fantasy.netlify.app/pages/2026-week-7-pre-draw.html
